'''鈭歠-r-n''' ('''kafaran''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbody|unbody]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbody|unbody]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafaran
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifaran|thifaran]] || [[word:jifaran|jifaran]] || [[word:shifaran|shifaran]] || [[word:kifaran|kifaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufaran|thuthufaran]] || [[word:jujufaran|jujufaran]] || [[word:shushufaran|shushufaran]] || [[word:kukufaran|kukufaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufaran|thufaran]] || [[word:jufaran|jufaran]] || [[word:shufaran|shufaran]] || [[word:kufaran|kufaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufaran|thufaran]] || [[word:jufaran|jufaran]] || [[word:shufaran|shufaran]] || [[word:kufaran|kufaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefaran|thefaran]] || [[word:jefaran|jefaran]] || [[word:shefaran|shefaran]] || [[word:kefaran|kefaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofaran|thothofaran]] || [[word:jojofaran|jojofaran]] || [[word:shoshofaran|shoshofaran]] || [[word:kokofaran|kokofaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofaran|thofaran]] || [[word:jofaran|jofaran]] || [[word:shofaran|shofaran]] || [[word:kofaran|kofaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofaran|thofaran]] || [[word:jofaran|jofaran]] || [[word:shofaran|shofaran]] || [[word:kofaran|kofaran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]] || [[word:faran|faran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙faran|th忙faran]] || [[word:j忙faran|j忙faran]] || [[word:sh忙faran|sh忙faran]] || [[word:k忙faran|k忙faran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafaran|thathafaran]] || [[word:jajafaran|jajafaran]] || [[word:shashafaran|shashafaran]] || [[word:kakafaran|kakafaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafaran|thafaran]] || [[word:jafaran|jafaran]] || [[word:shafaran|shafaran]] || [[word:kafaran|kafaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafaran|thafaran]] || [[word:jafaran|jafaran]] || [[word:shafaran|shafaran]] || [[word:kafaran|kafaran]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafaran|shafaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafaran|goshafaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafaran|gokishafaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafarann眉|shafarann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafarannkn眉|goshafarannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafarann眉|gokishafarann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafaransh毛|shafaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafarannksh毛|goshafarannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafaransh毛|gokishafaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafaranro|shafaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarannkro|goshafarannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafaranro|gokishafaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafaranmu|shafaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarannkmu|goshafarannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafaranmu|gokishafaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafaransher|shafaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafarannksher|goshafarannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafaransher|gokishafaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafaranng|shafaranng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafarannkng|goshafarannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafaranng|gokishafaranng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafaranya|shafaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafarannkya|goshafarannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafaranya|gokishafaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafaranyam|shafaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafarannkyam|goshafarannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafaranyam|gokishafaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafarann眉sh毛|shafarann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarannkn眉sh毛|goshafarannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafarann眉sh毛|gokishafarann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafarann眉ro|shafarann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarannkn眉ro|goshafarannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafarann眉ro|gokishafarann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafarann眉mu|shafarann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarannkn眉mu|goshafarannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafarann眉mu|gokishafarann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafaransh毛n眉|shafaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarannksh毛n眉|goshafarannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafaransh毛n眉|gokishafaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafaransh毛ro|shafaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarannksh毛ro|goshafarannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafaransh毛ro|gokishafaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafaransh毛mu|shafaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarannksh毛mu|goshafarannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafaransh毛mu|gokishafaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafaranron眉|shafaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarannkron眉|goshafarannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafaranron眉|gokishafaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafaranrosh毛|shafaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarannkrosh毛|goshafarannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafaranrosh毛|gokishafaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafaranromu|shafaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafarannkromu|goshafarannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafaranromu|gokishafaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafaranmun眉|shafaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafarannkmun眉|goshafarannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafaranmun眉|gokishafaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafaranmush毛|shafaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafarannkmush毛|goshafarannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafaranmush毛|gokishafaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafaranmuro|shafaranmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafarannkmuro|goshafarannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafaranmuro|gokishafaranmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
